dungeon: GENUINE ROTF FACECAM stream (streamer 'Turychor' — webcam + 'LEAVE A LIKE' overlay; but the chat box is only PARTIALLY covered so much IS readable). A multi-dungeon realm session through standard dungeons (white VAULT, DESERT, grass REALM, a PURPLE loot dungeon). Mostly CORROBORATION of already-built content: the custom Oryx HP-BOAST mechanic + the chicken meme boss. KEY finding: resolves that the 'Cluck Cluck Chicken' new-boss candidate is the SAME as the already-built 'Giant Oryx Chicken' (shared cluck taunts).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+f_frames (facecam-limited): a realm-hub session feeding standard dungeons — WHITE/GREY VAULT rooms (chest grids), a BROWN/TAN DESERT dungeon, the green GRASS REALM (open island), and a PURPLE/dark dungeon with colourful loot bags. bosses.name: Giant Oryx Chicken
attacks: not isolated (facecam, no bossends) -> see built Giant Oryx Chicken (chicken meme boss)
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Giant Oryx Chicken'). *** PROVENANCE RESOLUTION ***: these are the SAME cluck taunts I previously attributed to a NEW 'Cluck Cluck Chicken' boss (disc_EMgDk9BDwOE). Here they are clearly spoken by 'Giant Oryx Chicken' (ALREADY BUILT, OCBosses2). So 'Cluck Cluck Chicken' = 'Giant Oryx Chicken' (same chicken meme boss) -> do NOT build a separate Cluck Cluck Chicken; it would duplicate the built Giant Oryx Chicken. ALSO: the built Giant Oryx Chicken taunt is 'Cluck cluck BOCK!!' but footage shows 'BUCK!!' + the fuller 'Cluck cluck cluck... CLUCK!' / 'CLLLUUUCCCKKK!!!' -> enrich/verify the built taunt (BOCK->BUCK + add the cluck lines).

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God (HP-boast)
phases: announces a scaling hitpoint total in taunts
taunts: Foolish humans! My 1313212 hitpoints give me strength!
Meloo... how I still have 2023322 hitpoints!
There is no point in running, but you will anyway!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. CORROBORATES the custom ROTF Oryx HP-BOAST mechanic (Oryx announces a scaling hitpoint number: 1313212 / 2023322) first documented in disc_EMgDk9BDwOE. 'There is no point in running, but you will anyway!' is a likely base-canon Oryx line -> flagged, not claimed as custom. The HP-boast numbers + format ARE the custom ROTF behaviour.
